summary: AMZN is showing signs of oversold conditions and rebound potential, but is also at risk of oversold volatility. The bullish factors currently outweigh the bearish factors, but caution is advised.
bullish_factors: The 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average.
RSI is below 30, suggesting oversold conditions and rebound potential.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is below the 26-day EMA, suggesting weak momentum.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
